recommendations.title: I Am the Pretty Thing That Lives in the House
recommendations.overview: A young nurse takes care of an elderly author who lives in a haunted house.

recommendations.title: The Blackcoat's Daughter
recommendations.overview: Two young women at a prestigious prep school are assailed by an evil, invisible power when they're stranded over winter break.

recommendations.title: Gretel & Hansel
recommendations.overview: A long time ago in a distant fairy tale countryside, a young girl leads her little brother into a dark wood in desperate search of food and work, only to stumble upon a nexus of terrifying evil.

recommendations.title: Longlegs
recommendations.overview: FBI Agent Lee Harker is a gifted new recruit assigned to the unsolved case of an elusive serial killer. As the case takes complex turns, unearthing evidence of the occult, Harker discovers a personal connection to the merciless killer and must race a

recommendations.title: Keeper
recommendations.overview: Liz and Malcolm escape for a romantic anniversary weekend at a secluded cabin. When Malcolm suddenly returns to the city, Liz finds herself isolated and in the presence of an unspeakable evil that reveals the cabin's horrifying secrets.

recommendations.title: The Wrecking Crew
recommendations.overview: Estranged half-brothers Jonny and James reunite after their father's mysterious death. As they search for the truth, buried secrets reveal a conspiracy threatening to tear their family apart.

recommendations.title: Twinless
recommendations.overview: Two men who lost their respective twin brothers develop a growing friendship after meeting in a support group. However, both harbor long-hidden secrets that threaten to tear them apart.

recommendations.title: Braindead
recommendations.overview: When a Sumatran rat-monkey bites Lionel Cosgrove's mother, she's transformed into a zombie and begins killing (and transforming) the entire town while Lionel races to keep things under control.

recommendations.title: Kapoor & Sons
recommendations.overview: Returning home to visit their ill grandfather, two estranged brothers must confront their unresolved rivalry while their parents’ marriage frays.

recommendations.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
recommendations.overview: While working underground to fix a water main, Brooklyn plumbers—and brothers—Mario and Luigi are transported down a mysterious pipe and wander into a magical new world. But when the brothers are separated, Mario embarks on an epic quest to find Luig
